---
title: "El costo oculto del Oro Verde"
subtitle: "Monocultivo de aguacate y deforestación en Michoacán"
author: "HuerfanitosUTM"
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    scrolling: false
    theme: darkly
    css: dashboard_styles.css
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/HuerfanitosUTM
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

# ============================================================================
# SETUP: Librerías y resolución de rutas
# ============================================================================
from pathlib import Path
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.graph_objects as go

# --- Resolver directorio de datos ---
cwd = Path.cwd()
candidatos = [cwd / "data", cwd.parent / "data"]
DATA_DIR = next((p for p in candidatos if p.exists()), None)
PROC = DATA_DIR / "procesados" if DATA_DIR else None

# --- Paleta ---
VERDE  = "#2e7d32"
AMBAR  = "#ffa726"
ROJO   = "#ef5350"
GRIS   = "#b0bec5"

LAYOUT_DARK = dict(
    paper_bgcolor="rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor="rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    font=dict(family="Inter, sans-serif", color="#e0e0e0", size=11),
    margin=dict(l=50, r=20, t=10, b=30),
    hoverlabel=dict(bgcolor="#1e252e", font_size=11, font_family="Inter"),
)

# ============================================================================
# CARGA DE DATOS
# ============================================================================
df_maestro = pd.read_csv(PROC / "dataset_maestro_ods15.csv") if PROC else pd.DataFrame()
df_agri = pd.read_csv(PROC / "gfw_historico_agricola_mich.csv") if PROC else pd.DataFrame()
df_drivers = pd.read_csv(PROC / "gfw_drivers_perdida_completo_es.csv") if PROC else pd.DataFrame()
df_bio = pd.read_csv(PROC / "biodiversidad_especies_ods15.csv") if PROC else pd.DataFrame()
df_perdida = pd.read_csv(PROC / "gfw_historico_perdida_emisiones.csv") if PROC else pd.DataFrame()
```

## Row {height=18%}

### Column {width=55%}

```{python}
#| title: "ODS 15 · Vida de Ecosistemas Terrestres"
from IPython.display import Markdown
Markdown("""<div class="pregunta-ods">
<span class="ods-badge">🌲 ODS 15 · VIDA DE ECOSISTEMAS TERRESTRES</span>
<p class="pregunta-texto">¿En qué medida la expansión del <em>monocultivo de aguacate</em> compromete la integridad de los ecosistemas forestales en Michoacán y el cumplimiento de las metas del <em>ODS 15</em>?</p>
</div>""")
```

### Column {width=45%}

```{python}
#| title: "Datos clave"
Markdown("""<div class="stats-grid">
  <div class="stat-item"><span class="stat-value">113</span><span class="stat-label">Municipios</span></div>
  <div class="stat-item"><span class="stat-value stat-red">111,224 ha</span><span class="stat-label">Bosque perdido</span></div>
  <div class="stat-item"><span class="stat-value stat-amber">80.7%</span><span class="stat-label">Sin apoyo gub.</span></div>
  <div class="stat-item"><span class="stat-value">51M Mg</span><span class="stat-label">Emisiones CO₂</span></div>
</div>""")
```

## Row {height=41%}

### Column {width=50%}

```{python}
#| title: "Análisis de Burbujas: Producción vs Riesgo de Invasión Forestal"

fig_bubble = px.scatter(
    df_maestro, 
    x="ha_aguacate", 
    y="pct_bosque", 
    size="ton_aguacate", 
    color="impact_ratio",
    hover_name="municipio",
    labels={
        "ha_aguacate": "Superficie Aguacate (Ha)", 
        "pct_bosque": "% Salud Forestal", 
        "impact_ratio": "Índice de Invasión",
    },
    color_continuous_scale=px.colors.diverging.RdYlGn[::-1],
    range_color=[0.2, 1.2],
)
fig_bubble.update_traces(marker=dict(line=dict(width=1, color="white")))
fig_bubble.update_layout(**LAYOUT_DARK)
fig_bubble.show()
```

### Column {width=50%}

```{python}
#| title: "Treemap: Distribución Nacional del Aprovechamiento Maderable"

df_bio_clean = df_bio[~df_bio["entidad"].str.startswith("00")].copy()
df_melt = df_bio_clean.melt(
    id_vars=["entidad"],
    value_vars=["Pino", "Encino", "Otras"],
    var_name="Especie",
    value_name="Volumen",
)
df_melt = df_melt[df_melt["Volumen"] > 0]

fig_tree = px.treemap(
    df_melt,
    path=["Especie", "entidad"],
    values="Volumen",
    color="Especie",
    color_discrete_map={"Pino": "#2E8B57", "Encino": "#8B4513", "Otras": "#DAA520"},
)
fig_tree.update_traces(textinfo="label+percent parent")
fig_tree.update_layout(**LAYOUT_DARK)
fig_tree.show()
```

## Row {height=41%}

### Column {width=50%}

```{python}
#| title: "Impacto Directo: Producción vs Pérdida Forestal (2012-2024)"

df_agri_f = df_agri[df_agri["loss_year"] >= 2012].copy()
years = np.arange(2012, 2025)
prod_vals = {2012: 1.1, 2017: 1.9, 2019: 2.1, 2022: 3.42}
production = np.interp(years, list(prod_vals.keys()), list(prod_vals.values()))

fig_imp = go.Figure()
fig_imp.add_trace(go.Bar(
    x=df_agri_f["loss_year"],
    y=df_agri_f["loss_area_ha"],
    name="Pérdida forestal (Ha)",
    marker_color=ROJO,
    opacity=0.5,
))
fig_imp.add_trace(go.Scatter(
    x=years,
    y=production,
    name="Producción Aguacate (M Ton)",
    mode="lines+markers",
    line=dict(color=VERDE, width=3),
    marker=dict(size=6),
    yaxis="y2",
))
fig_imp.update_layout(
    **LAYOUT_DARK,
    yaxis=dict(title="Ha Perdidas", gridcolor="rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", title_font=dict(size=10)),
    yaxis2=dict(title="Millones Ton", overlaying="y", side="right", title_font=dict(size=10)),
    xaxis=dict(title="Año", gridcolor="rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", title_font=dict(size=10)),
    legend=dict(orientation="h", yanchor="top", y=-0.18, xanchor="center", x=0.5, font=dict(size=9)),
    barmode="overlay",
)
fig_imp.show()
```

### Column {width=50%}

```{python}
#| title: "Evolución de Pérdida de Bosque por Motor"

fig_evol = px.bar(
    df_drivers, 
    x="loss_year", 
    y="loss_area_ha", 
    color="drivers_type",
    labels={"loss_year": "Año", "loss_area_ha": "Hectáreas Perdidas", "drivers_type": "Motor"},
)
fig_evol.update_layout(
    **LAYOUT_DARK,
    xaxis=dict(gridcolor="rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", title_font=dict(size=10)),
    yaxis=dict(gridcolor="rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", title_font=dict(size=10)),
    legend=dict(orientation="h", yanchor="top", y=-0.18, xanchor="center", x=0.5, font=dict(size=8)),
    barmode="stack",
)
fig_evol.show()
```
